cit.basis: 20% CIT on resident companies; 25% on non-resident / foreign companies (e.g. branches). Administered by the Fiji Revenue and Customs Service (FRCS).
cit.note: Sector-specific incentives, tax-free regions and concessions may alter the effective rate; out of scope for this SME estimator.

vat.note: 15% Value Added Tax on most goods and services.

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated rates and thresholds. Figures have NOT been verified against primary FRCS legislation or guidance and must be confirmed before any filing, advice, or production use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified, AI-estimated LedgerField estimates.
Residency status, incentives, concessions, WHT, relief and sector rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official FRCS guidance and a local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
